AI Content Operating System
for Exam Educators

Two taps a day. Pick a topic, approve the post — your Instagram runs on autopilot while you focus on teaching.

Smart Topic Suggestions

AI picks 3 ready-to-go topics daily, one from each of your content pillars

AI Content Generation

Caption, hashtags and image — built, brand-checked and ready to approve

Competitor Intelligence

Track competitor accounts and surface trending topics before you miss them

Performance Insights

Know what content works and let the AI auto-adjust your strategy over time

Built for coaching institutes & educators · India
